subcodes.first_line: O favored servant! That manifest Light hath shone forth like unto a bright candle in the assemblage of the world, and the moths of the rose-garden [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده مقبل آن نور مبین چون شمع روشن در انجمن عالم برافروخت و پروانگان گلشن
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @martyrs and martyrdom, @love as fire, @Manifestation of God as sun
